Package org.areslib.hmi

Class AresLEDManager

java.lang.Object
org.areslib.hmi.AresLEDManager
public class AresLEDManager extends Object
Singleton manager to control visual feedback via REV Blinkin LED Driver. Emulates the FRC CANdle/LED architecture to abstract physical hardware from subsystem logic. Subsystems request semantic states instead of hardware colors.

  • Method Summary

    Description

    getCurrentState()
    Returns the current active LED state.

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static AresLEDManager getInstance()
      Returns the singleton instance of the LED Manager. Thread-safe.
      Returns:
      The singleton instance of the LED Manager

    • init

      public void init(com.qualcomm.robotcore.hardware.HardwareMap hwMap, String deviceName)
      Initializes the physical REV Blinkin hardware.
      Parameters:
      hwMap - The active OpMode hardware map
      deviceName - The configuration name of the Blinkin driver

    • setState

      public void setState(LEDState newState)
      Sets the active LED state and applies the mapped visual pattern. Promotes state changes to AresTelemetry.
      Parameters:
      newState - The semantic state requested

    • getCurrentState

      public LEDState getCurrentState()
      Returns the current active LED state.
      Returns:
      The current active LED state
